---
title: "Class 17: Basics of Hospital Pricing"
date: 2026-03-17
---

In this module, we'll introduce instrumental variables as an identification strategy. We'll motivate the approach in the context of hospital pricing, where the research question is whether and to what extent hospitals receiving a financial penalty under the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (HRRP) also raise their prices.

## Readings and other links

Links to papers are listed alongside the full reference. PDFs of each paper are also available on **Canvas**.

- <i class="fa fa-database"></i> Data for this module:
    - [Hospital Cost Report Information System (HCRIS)](https://github.com/imccart/HCRIS) repository
    - See also a similar repository [here](https://github.com/asacarny/hospital-cost-reports) from [Adam Sacarny](http://sacarny.com/)
